description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is clad in dark panels, contrasted by large floor-to-ceiling windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. A prominent upper-level terrace is adorned with multiple planter boxes, providing a touch of greenery and outdoor living space. The house is elevated on sturdy columns at one end, creating a partially open ground level and a visually striking cantilevered section. The ground floor includes wide glass doors that open to a spacious interior, visible with contemporary furnishings. Surrounding the base of the house is a border of low, dense shrubbery, enhancing its integration with the urban landscape.
description: A modern, boxy house with large windows, a flat roof, and an upper terrace with planter boxes. The exterior features dark paneling, elevated sections, and lush landscaping at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass windows, open terrace with planter boxes, and the elevated section supported by columns.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by a solid dark wall with minimal window openings and a visible green shrub border at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the extensive window arrangement, terrace planters, and the house's integration with surrounding greenery.
description_view_3: Top-down view of the terrace with planter boxes, visible bedroom through open doors, and the cantilevered structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features wide glass doors opening onto a flat surface, with no visible steps or porch, emphasizing a minimalist and open design.
